corrections.note: Printed text reads γίνεται, not γεύεται; γεύεται is an apparatus variant.

corrections.location: line for 11, note on ὁ σωζόμενος
corrections.current: (improb μη et pr ο ase. ℵAC βης ἡς.)
corrections.correct: (improb μη et pr ο ase. ℵAC bis ης.)
corrections.note: Latin note misread: printed has bis ης, not Greek-looking βης ἡς.
Apparatus reading begins κατα-, not κατε-.
Siglum ℵc.a. belongs to πρωτογονου; πρωτοτοκων is the next lemma for verse 18.

notes: Bottom page number 717 is present in scan but not part of transcription. Body includes marginal verse/line references as in transcript; no correction needed there.
